source.description: Six-panel raster contact sheet generated for the July 6, 2026 fried chicken drumstick marker-doodle lesson, reviewed before cropping.
source.notes: Prompt required one consistent bold marker drumstick, no sticker or badge border, no embedded labels, arrows, numbers, signatures, or fake UI.

process_strategy: The sequence builds the bone handle, light drumstick guide, crunchy bumpy edge, bite-free crispy texture, paper wrapper, and golden marker fill before the final panel only thickens outlines and clarifies existing texture.

final_elements.name: bone handle
final_elements.description: A small white bone handle with a rounded end.

final_elements.name: light drumstick guide
final_elements.description: A light teardrop guide for the chicken shape attached to the bone.

final_elements.name: crunchy outer bumps
final_elements.description: Uneven marker bumps that replace the smooth guide as the final chicken outline.

final_elements.name: crispy texture marks
final_elements.description: Small dots, short dashes, and squiggles on the chicken surface.

final_elements.name: bone end detail
final_elements.description: A small inner curve on the bone end and a line where bone meets chicken.

final_elements.name: paper wrapper
final_elements.description: A simple gray paper wrapper behind the drumstick.

final_elements.name: golden marker fill
final_elements.description: Bright golden-brown marker fill inside the already-drawn bumpy chicken shape.

final_elements.name: darker crispy accents
final_elements.description: Small darker brown accent marks on existing crispy texture.

frames.visible_job: Draws the bone handle and a light teardrop drumstick guide with loose marker construction.
Replaces the smooth guide with uneven crunchy bumps around the chicken outline.
Adds crispy dots, dashes, and squiggles across the chicken surface.
Adds bone-end detail and a simple paper wrapper behind the drumstick.
Fills the already-drawn chicken with golden marker color and darker crispy accents.

final_step.visible_job: Thickens the black bumpy outline, strengthens the crispy texture, evens the golden marker fill, and clarifies the bone and paper wrapper already present.

rejection_checks: No bone, drumstick guide, crispy edge, texture mark, paper wrapper, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may ink, fill, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
